tagline: You Deserve a Picture Perfect Pool

hero.headline: 35 Years of Pools Done Picture Perfect
hero.subheadline: Your pool deserves a team that grew up around the water. From weekly maintenance to full construction, the Duncan family has kept East Bay pools sparkling since 1990. You relax poolside -- we handle the rest.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care from<br class="hidden md:block"> Build to Maintenance
services.subtitle: Whether you need a new pool built, an old one remodeled, or just reliable weekly service -- Picture Perfect handles it all with 35 years of East Bay expertise.

cards.title: Residential Pool Service
cards.description: Weekly cleaning, skimming, water chemistry balancing, and equipment checks that keep your family's pool sparkling and swim-ready all year long.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Professional maintenance for HOAs, apartment complexes, retirement communities, and gyms with customized service plans built for your facility.

cards.title: Pool Construction
cards.description: Expert new pool design and construction with meticulous attention to local codes, turning your backyard dream into a stunning East Bay oasis.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Modern updates including new finishes, tile work, decking, and equipment upgrades that breathe new life into your existing pool.

cards.title: Pool Repair
cards.description: Fast, reliable repairs for pumps, motors, heaters, plumbing, and filters. Most issues diagnosed and resolved in a single visit.

cards.title: Reverse Osmosis
cards.description: Advanced water treatment using reverse osmosis technology to restore crystal-clear water quality without draining and refilling your pool.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Picture Perfect Pool

steps.title: Call the Duncan Family
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We'll provide a straightforward, honest quote within 24 hours -- no pressure, no gimmicks.

steps.title: We Bring 35 Years of Expertise
steps.description: Our licensed, experienced team arrives on schedule and handles everything -- cleaning, chemistry, repairs, or construction -- with care and precision.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Perfect Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear, safe, and swim-ready while you enjoy the East Bay sunshine. If anything isn't perfect, we come back and make it right.

about.label: Why East Bay Trusts Us
about.headline: A Family of Swimmers Caring for Your Pool Since 1990
about.description: Founded by Brian Duncan -- a Cal State Chico graduate, All-American swimmer, and lifelong aquatics professional -- Picture Perfect Pool Services has been the East Bay's trusted pool partner for over 35 years. Now with son Sean continuing the family tradition, we bring the same passion and expertise to every pool we touch. We hold multiple California contractor licenses and have served in IPSSA leadership roles because this industry is our life, not just our job.

features.title: Multiple CA Contractor Licenses
features.description: We hold C-61, D-35, and C-53 licenses -- fully qualified to build, remodel, repair, and service any pool in California.

features.title: Second-Generation Family Business
features.description: Brian's son Sean has joined the company, continuing the Duncan family's commitment to pool care excellence in the East Bay.

features.title: IPSSA Industry Leadership
features.description: Brian served as East Bay IPSSA Chapter President and Regional Director -- proof of our deep industry expertise and commitment.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Get a custom quote for your pool's needs. From weekly service to full construction -- honest pricing from a family you can trust.

guarantee.headline: Our "Picture Perfect" Promise
guarantee.description: If your pool isn't picture perfect after any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right at no extra charge. With 35 years of reputation on the line, we don't cut corners. Your satisfaction is the Duncan family's word.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly pool service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. We serve Martinez, Walnut Creek, Concord, Danville, and the entire East Bay -- just give us a call and we'll find a time that works for you.

faqs.question: What contractor licenses do you hold?
faqs.answer: We hold California C-61, D-35, and C-53 contractor licenses, making us fully qualified for pool construction, remodeling, repairs, and service. We've been a licensed contractor since our founding in 1990.

faqs.question: Do you handle both residential and commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We maintain residential pools for homeowners and commercial pools for HOAs, apartment complexes, retirement homes, and fitness centers throughout Contra Costa and Solano counties.

faqs.question: What makes Picture Perfect different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: We're a family-owned company founded by an All-American swimmer with over 35 years of experience. We hold multiple contractor licenses and have served in IPSSA leadership -- this isn't a side job for us, it's our family's legacy.

faqs.question: What is reverse osmosis pool treatment?
faqs.answer: Reverse osmosis is an advanced water purification process that restores your pool water to crystal-clear quality without the need to fully drain and refill. It's faster, wastes less water, and delivers better results than traditional methods.

testimonials.name: Happy Homeowner
testimonials.text: A real pleasure to deal with. Extremely quick service, knowledgeable and friendly. I will always use them in the future. Our pool has never looked better.

testimonials.name: East Bay Client
testimonials.text: Outstanding service from the moment we decided to work with them. Their attention to detail, commitment to keeping the customer informed, and stellar after-sales support make them a company I would highly recommend to anyone.

testimonials.name: Martinez Resident
testimonials.text: The best customer service I have had since moving here. Very knowledgeable, prompt, courteous, communicative, and all around excellent. The Duncan family truly cares about their customers.
